data.title: Flora Growth Launches First THC-Infused Beverage In 4 Flavors, Provides Update On Hoshi Investment
Taiwan Semiconductor Halts Shipments After Huawei Link Discovered, US Sanctions Cited
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor stopped shipping to Huawei due to potential US sanctions violation. Chinese companies use illegal routes to access chips.

data.title: Honeywell Q3 Earnings: Revenue And Profit Growth, Adjusts Annual Outlook Factoring Acquisitions
data.description: Honeywell reported Q3 results and updated FY24 guidance. Revenue grew 6% to $9.728B, missing consensus. EPS of $2.58 beat expectations. Aerospace and Building Solutions saw strong growth. FY24 sales outlook lowered, EPS tightened.

data.title: Donald Trump Leads, But Harris 'Field Goal Could Win the Game,' Says Analyst Who Thinks Prediction Market Are Trading Close To Where They Should
data.description: President of Bianco Research says election betting markets are fair and reflect accurate information. Trump has slight lead but Harris still has a chance. Unforeseen events could impact results.

data.title: Ford CEO Jim Farley Raves About His 6-Month Experience With Xiaomi EV SU7
data.description: The admiration from Farley comes at a time when the U.S. is considering a ban on Chinese-made vehicles.
